scripts.build: prisma generate && next build && mkdir -p .next/standalone/.next && cp -r public .next/standalone/ && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/
scripts.build:local: prisma generate && prisma db push --accept-data-loss && prisma db seed && next build && mkdir -p .next/standalone/.next && cp -r public .next/standalone/ && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/
scripts.start: mkdir -p .next/standalone/.next && cp -r public .next/standalone/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/ 2>/dev/null || true && (PORT=${PORT:-3000} node .next/standalone/server.js || next start -p ${PORT:-3000})
scripts.setup: prisma generate && tsx prisma/init.ts && prisma db seed
